metadata.description: Comprehensive guidance for building and deploying static websites with the Astro framework

plugins.name: publishing-astro-websites
plugins.description: Comprehensive guidance for building and deploying static websites with the Astro framework. Use when asked to create an Astro site, deploy Astro to Firebase, Netlify, Vercel, Cloudflare Pages, or GitHub Pages, set up content collections, add Mermaid diagrams, configure i18n, build a static blog, set up Astro search (Pagefind or Fuse.js), manage environment variables in Astro, or configure Astro markdown. Covers SSG fundamentals, Content Collections (Astro 4.x and 5.0+ Content Layer API), Markdown/MDX, partial hydration, islands architecture, environment variables, deployment to multiple platforms, and WebSocket/SSE limitations.
